steps.title: Identify what x = 0 represents
steps.content: In the function $f(x) = 4,000(0.75)^x$, the variable $x$ represents years after 2012. Therefore, $x = 0$ corresponds to the year 2012 itself.

steps.title: Find the initial population
steps.content: At the starting point $x = 0$, we evaluate: $$f(0) = 4,000(0.75)^0 = 4,000 \cdot 1 = 4,000$$ The output 4,000 is the beetle population in 2012. Therefore, 4,000 is the initial beetle population for this species and area in 2012. That matches choice A — A is correct.
